identity.name: Remora
identity.tagline: The Search Engine for AI Agents
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode Industrial, Cybernetic Minimalist, High-Density Data
identity.description: An API-first platform connecting AI agents to structured world knowledge.

rules: All caps labels MUST use tracking-widest (0.2em)
Code blocks MUST use JetBrains Mono

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

components.name: Card
components.style_override: bg-card border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-lg
components.usage: Use for all dashboard widgets and feature highlights.

components.name: Input
components.style_override: bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-10

components.name: Badge
components.style_override: rounded-sm px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

components.name: Sonner
components.usage: Use for all toast notifications. Position: bottom-right.

hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay/opacity reduction.

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: The app must default to dark mode. Ensure 'dark' class is present on html/body.
NO GRADIENT TEXT: Do not use gradient text. It looks cheap. Use solid white for primary headings.
BENTO GRIDS: Use Bento Grids for the feature section on the landing page.
DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Sidebar (left, fixed, w-64) + Header (top, sticky, h-16) + Main Content (scrollable).
INTERACTIVITY: Add subtle hover effects to all cards (border color change or slight lift).
CHARTS: Use Recharts customized to match the dark theme (no default colors). Use the palette colors.
FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components. Labels should be small and uppercase.
Create a 'layout.js' for the Dashboard that includes the Sidebar and Header.
Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) for all text. Muted text must still be readable.
Do not use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use realistic tech copy (e.g., 'API Latency: 45ms', 'Agent-ID: 8821x').

universal_guidelines.spacing: Use p-8 or p-12 for section padding. Don't crowd elements.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use 'framer-motion' for simple entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up). Duration: 0.3s.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).
universal_guidelines.components: Reuse components from /components/ui. Do not build custom buttons unless necessary.
universal_guidelines.icons: Use lucide-react. Icon size default: 16px (w-4 h-4) or 20px (w-5 h-5).
